rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL CORRAL JR ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing For First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus & Court Reporter Fee Paid
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 8, 2021, line 1. PETITIONER MIGUEL CORRAL, DEANNA MICROS, SUELEN VIERA VALE, PHILIP CLARKE, RONAN MOHAN, KATE MORHAM, KYLE MORHAM, SHERYL SAMSON Notice Of Hearing For First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus & Court Reporter Fee Paid is continued to February 11, 2021 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH DEL ROSARIO ET AL VS. CONCHITA MACABEO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Conchita Macabeo For An Order Setting Aside Dismissal And Reinstating Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 8, 2021, line 2. DEFENDANT CONCHITA MACABEO Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Conchita Macabeo For An Order Setting Aside Dismissal And Reinstating Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. The parties are to meet and confer regarding the new trial date (parties to consider 5-year limitation) and advise the Court regarding the agreed-upon date by a joint declaration by 8:30 a.m. on January 8, 2021. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY Z DILLEY ET AL VS. BURRADELL CONSTRUCTION INC. A CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Santos And Urrutia Associates Inc And Rodrigo Santos For Good Faith Determination Of Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 8, 2021, line 3. DEFENDANT SANTOS & URRUTIA ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA, RODRIGO SANTOS Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Santos And Urrutia Associates Inc And Rodrigo Santos For Good Faith Determination Of Settlement is DENIED. Tech-Built factors are not met, no showing that the settlement amount is in the ball park of the moving party's proportionate liability. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2801 LEAVENWORTH-CANNERY LLC VS. FORT 1 LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 8, 2021, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT ABDUL FARID Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1013. If the moving party indents to re-file and set this matter on proper notice, the Court notes that there is no record on file and none is mentioned in the moving papers indicating that the moving party prevailed in this action. The only order on file granted cross-defendant's motion to quash with instructions to re-serve; reference to dismissal in the proposed order was crossed-out in the final order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE MEJIA VS. NICHOLAS PATRICK WOOD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 8, 2021, line 5. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS WOOD DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
